editor.label: Reset Guild if No Players in
editor.description: In hours how long to reset/remove a guild with no online players.

editor.label: Ban List URL
editor.description: If you have your own to use, paste it here!

editor.label: Base Camp Max Allowed
editor.description: Maximum allowed base camps on the map.

editor.label: Max Pals At Base
editor.description: Maximum allowed pals working at a single base.

editor.label: Enable Timer to Remove Inactive Guilds?
editor.description: Check the box to enable the timer to remove guilds every so often via the time set above.

editor.label: Can Pickup Other's Death Penalty Drops?
editor.description: Should you be able to pickup another's guild death penalty drop?

editor.label: Defense Other Guild Player
editor.description: Not sure what this does. Enable at own risk.

editor.label: Enable Fast Travel?
editor.description: Checked to allow fast travel, uncheck to disallow.

editor.label: Enable Friendly Fire?
editor.description: Want to kill your pals and your guildmates? Enable it.

editor.label: Enable Raid Events?
editor.description: Checked means ON, Unchecked means OFF.

editor.label: Enable Player to Player Damage
editor.description: When PvP is enabled this is for Pal battles, enabling this allows players to directly kill each other.

editor.label: Player Stays after Logout?
editor.description: By checking this, when players logout their character remains in the world to be interacted with.

editor.label: PvP Enabled?
editor.description: Enables Pals from player's parties to fight, enable Player to Player to directly attack other players.

editor.label: Damage to Structure
editor.description: The multiplier of damage that structures take from all sources.

editor.label: Structure Decay Rate
editor.description: How fast a structure decays over time.

editor.label: Gathering Items Mult
editor.description: Multiplier at which you gather items from world.

editor.label: Object HP Mult
editor.description: HP of collection objects in world to increase amount gathered from.

editor.label: Object Respawn Rate
editor.description: Multiplier to determine how fast to respawn a gathering node on the map.

editor.label: Day Time Speed
editor.description: High values will result in faster day speed

editor.label: Dropped Item Spoil Timer
editor.description:
How long in hours should items stay before despawning?
0.5=30 Minutes, 3 = 3 Hours

editor.label: Max Dropped Items
editor.description: Max amount of dropped items in world.

editor.label: Enemy Drop Rate
editor.description: Items dropped from enemies mulitplier.

editor.label: Night Time Speed
editor.description: High values will result in faster night speed

editor.label: Damage From Pal
editor.description: (Attack Mulitplier)

editor.label: Damage To Pal
editor.description: (Defense) Multiplier

editor.label: Incubate Massive Egg Time
editor.description: Time in hours to incubate Massive Egg

editor.label: Damage From Player
editor.description: (Attack) Multiplier

editor.label: Damage To Player
editor.description: (Defense) Multiplier

editor.label: RCON Enabled?
editor.description: Check box to enable RCON.

editor.label: Server Password
editor.description: Leave blank for no password.

editor.label: Work Speed
editor.description: The rate multiplier that all "work" is done within.

[/Script/OnlineSubsystemUtils.IpNetDriver]
NetServerMaxTickRate=120

[/Script/engine.engine]
bSmoothFrameRate=true    ; Enables the game engine to smooth out frame rate fluctuations for a more consistent visual experience.
bUseFixedFrameRate=false ; Disables the use of a fixed frame rate, allowing the game to dynamically adjust frame rate for optimal performance.
SmoothedFrameRateRange=(LowerBound=(Type=Inclusive,Value=30.000000),UpperBound=(Type=Exclusive,Value=120.000000)) ; Sets a target frame rate range for smoothing.
MinDesiredFrameRate=60.000000 ; Specifies a minimum acceptable frame rate, ensuring the game runs smoothly at least at this frame rate.
NetClientTicksPerSecond=120   ; Increases the update frequency for clients, enhancing responsiveness and reducing lag.


[/Script/socketsubsystemepic.epicnetdriver]
MaxClientRate=125000000          ; Maximum data transfer rate per client for all connections, set to a high value to prevent data capping.
MaxInternetClientRate=125000000  ; Specifically targets internet clients, allowing for high-volume data transfer without restrictions.

[/Script/engine.player]
ConfiguredInternetSpeed=125000000  ; Sets the assumed player internet speed in bytes per second. High value reduces chances of bandwidth throttling.

[/Script/Engine.RendererSettings]
r.DefaultFeature.Bloom=False
r.DefaultFeature.AmbientOcclusion=False
r.DefaultFeature.MotionBlur=False
r.DefaultFeature.LensFlare=False
r.DefaultFeature.AntiAliasing=0
r.ViewDistanceScale=1.0
r.ShadowQuality=0
r.Shadow.CSM.MaxCascades=1
r.Shadow.MaxResolution=512
r.Shadow.RadiusThreshold=0.1
r.Shadow.DistanceScale=0.5
r.ThreadedRendering=True
r.ThreadedPhysics=True

[/Script/Engine.GarbageCollectionSettings]
TimeBetweenPurgingPendingKillObjects=360

; Changes to this file will be reflected on the server.
; If any server settings are missing, please contact your assigned server technician.
[/Script/Pal.PalGameWorldSettings]
OptionSettings=(Difficulty=${Difficulty},DayTimeSpeedRate=${DayTimeSpeedRate},NightTimeSpeedRate=${NightTimeSpeedRate},ExpRate=${ExpRate},PalCaptureRate=${PalCaptureRate},PalSpawnNumRate=${PalSpawnNumRate},PalDamageRateAttack=${PalDamageRateAttack},PalDamageRateDefense=${PalDamageRateDefense},PlayerDamageRateAttack=${PlayerDamageRateAttack},PlayerDamageRateDefense=${PlayerDamageRateDefense},PlayerStomachDecreaceRate=${PlayerStomachDecreaceRate},PlayerStaminaDecreaceRate=${PlayerStaminaDecreaceRate},PlayerAutoHPRegeneRate=${PlayerAutoHPRegenRate},PlayerAutoHpRegeneRateInSleep=${PlayerAutoHpRegenRateInSleep},PalStomachDecreaceRate=${PalStomachDecreaceRate},PalStaminaDecreaceRate=${PalStaminaDecreaceRate},PalAutoHPRegeneRate=${PalAutoHPRegenRate},PalAutoHpRegeneRateInSleep=${PalAutoHpRegenRateInSleep},BuildObjectDamageRate=${BuildObjectDamageRate},BuildObjectDeteriorationDamageRate=${BuildObjectDeteriorationDamageRate},CollectionDropRate=${CollectionDropRate},CollectionObjectHpRate=${CollectionObjectHpRate},CollectionObjectRespawnSpeedRate=${CollectionObjectRespawnSpeedRate},EnemyDropItemRate=${EnemyDropItemRate},DeathPenalty=${DeathPenalty},bEnablePlayerToPlayerDamage=${bEnablePlayerToPlayerDamage},bEnableFriendlyFire=${bEnableFriendlyFire},bEnableInvaderEnemy=${bEnableInvaderEnemy},bActiveUNKO=${bActiveUNKO},bEnableAimAssistPad=${bEnableAimAssistPad},bEnableAimAssistKeyboard=${bEnableAimAssistKeyboard},DropItemMaxNum=${DropItemMaxNum},DropItemMaxNum_UNKO=${DropItemMaxNum_UNKO},BaseCampMaxNum=${BaseCampMaxNum},BaseCampWorkerMaxNum=${BaseCampWorkerMaxNum},DropItemAliveMaxHours=${DropItemAliveMaxHours},bAutoResetGuildNoOnlinePlayers=${bAutoResetGuildNoOnlinePlayers},AutoResetGuildTimeNoOnlinePlayers=${AutoResetGuildTimeNoOnlinePlayers},GuildPlayerMaxNum=${GuildPlayerMaxNum},PalEggDefaultHatchingTime=${PalEggDefaultHatchingTime},WorkSpeedRate=${WorkSpeedRate},bIsMultiplay=${bIsMultiplay},bIsPvP=${bIsPvP},bCanPickupOtherGuildDeathPenaltyDrop=${bCanPickupOtherGuildDeathPenaltyDrop},bEnableNonLoginPenalty=${bEnableNonLoginPenalty},bEnableFastTravel=${bEnableFastTravel},bIsStartLocationSelectByMap=${bIsStartLocationSelectByMap},bExistPlayerAfterLogout=${bExistPlayerAfterLogout},bEnableDefenseOtherGuildPlayer=${bEnableDefenseOtherGuildPlayer},CoopPlayerMaxNum=${CoopPlayerMaxNum},ServerPlayerMaxNum=${Slots},ServerDescription="${ServerDescription}",AdminPassword="${RconPassword}",ServerPassword="${ServerPassword}",PublicPort=${GamePort},PublicIP="${IPAddress}",RCONEnabled=${RCONEnabled},RCONPort=${RConPort},Region="${Region}",bUseAuth=${bUseAuth},BanListURL="${BanListURL}")

Archive Console Log On Stop
script.description: On stop, move .tca/console.log into Pal/Saved/Logs as console-<date>.log (ANSI stripped) so it appears in the Logs tab.
